Prices should be more varied!

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Good border crossing point, but pay attention to the time, it closes at 8 pm.

(Original)
Bom ponto de fronteira, mas se atente ao horário, fecha às 20h.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBajZMYy1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es un paso obligado para cruzar el paso de Jama, cuenta con sanitarios limpios y bien cuidados. Además allí se encuentra ubicado un cajero automático.

(Translated by Google)
It's a necessary stop for crossing the Jama Pass, and it has clean and well-maintained restrooms. There's also an ATM located there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBNjRfdE5nEAE

reviews.comment:
Estuvimos de paso desde chile a Argentina, te reciben usd, pesos argentinos y pesos chilenos y reciben tarjetas. Tienen café al paso con medialunas y menú de comida, bastante rico (me pedí una Mila napolitana con papas) No se paga para usar el baño como si lo hacen en chile. tiene wifi para estar comunicado. La gente muy atenta y amable

(Translated by Google)
We were passing through from Chile to Argentina. They accept USD, Argentine pesos, and Chilean pesos, and they accept credit cards. They have coffee on the go with croissants and a delicious lunch menu (I ordered a Mila Napolitana with potatoes). You don't have to pay to use the bathroom like they do in Chile. They have Wi-Fi so you can stay connected. The staff is very attentive and friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBdGFhaENBEAE

reviews.comment:
Un oasis en el camino!!

(Translated by Google)
An oasis along the way!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBNzcyX3FnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atencion baños algo sucios y tardan en atenderte

(Translated by Google)
Good service, bathrooms are a bit dirty and they take a while to serve you.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBNThqd2RREAE

reviews.comment:
Malo el gasoil, mala la atención, todos coqueados y doblados te atienden. No tienen variedad en el shop, les funciona mal internet, no tienen café. Un desastre

(Translated by Google)
The diesel is bad, the service is terrible, everyone's slumped and bent over. They have no variety in the shop, the internet is unreliable, and they don't have coffee. A disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBOExuUm1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Llegue a las 11 de la mañana del día 15/01 y tuve que esperar 3 horas que descarguen el combustible, viendo el camión parado dos horas seguidas sin descargarlo, un vez que realice la carga de nafta no me cargaron los puntos de ypf servíclub y no me ofrecieron factura ni ticket, una sola persona atendiendo el full y un solo playero para atender las filas interminables para la carga de combustible

(Translated by Google)
I arrived at 11am on January 15th and had to wait 3 hours for the fuel to be unloaded, watching the truck stopped for two hours straight without unloading it, once I loaded the gas they did not charge my YPF Servíclub points and they did not offer me an invoice or ticket, only one person attending the full and only one attendant to attend the endless lines for the fuel loading.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfXzVyZ3dBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los baños bien. Hay wifi. No hay pago con QR.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms are fine. There's Wi-Fi. They don't accept QR code payments.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfNFpfT1p3EAE

reviews.comment:
Parada obligada para descansar. Lugar cálido y baños higiénicos. Pedimos combos de café con leche y medialunas, bastante rico la verdad.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop for a break. Warm and inviting atmosphere with clean restrooms. We ordered coffee and croissant combos, which were quite delicious, actually.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfLXJlZnlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pase 4/5 veces ,parada  obligada para cargar combustible , tomar un café o un refresco , teniendo 1 o 2 personas o ninguna adelante siempre hay demora. Un café con leche el 14/01/25 $4.200 carísimo.

(Translated by Google)
I passed by 4 or 5 times; it's a mandatory stop for fuel, coffee, or a soft drink. Even with only one or two people ahead, or no one at all, there's always a delay. A coffee with milk on January 14, 2025, cost $4,200—extremely expensive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfaElfQ3NRRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Next to Passo Jama, there's Full, they refuel with Chilean or Argentinian pesos, just be mindful of having the correct change.

(Original)
Em anexo ao Passo Jama, tem Full, abastecem com pesos Chilenos ou Argentinos, só ficar ligado com o troco,
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURmaUlqZnZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Next to customs. A mandatory stop to refuel before crossing into Chile (the next gas station is 160km away) or on the way back to Argentina (where there are no more gas stations until you descend the mountain range).
As it is the only indispensable option, prices are above normal. But it is the only condition to arrive in Chile with fuel.

(Original)
Ao lado da aduana. Parada obrigatória para abastecer antes de atravessar para o Chile (o próximo posto fica a 160km) ou na volta pra Argentina ( que não existe mais posto até a descida da cordilheira).
Como é única opção  indispensável, os preços são acima do normal. Mais é a única condição pra chegar com combustível no Chile
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNmejRlMmF3EAE
